one_time_description: Corrections aux exercices antérieurs liées à l'analyse des états financiers des années antérieures des différents bailleurs de fonds, réduisant le surplus accumulé de 2 662 252 $
economic_notes: Six government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method: Société en commandite Scierie Opitciwan (55%), Société en commandite Services Forestiers Opitciwan (99.99%), Société en commandite Épicerie Opitciwonok (99.99%), Développement Économique Opitciwan inc. (100%), Société en commandite Station Services Opitciwan (99.99%), Société en commandite Opitciwan Télécom (99.99%). Total equity value 12,377,654.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2020. French-language combined financial statements (Fonds d'exploitation + Fonds d'habitation). Six GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Negative equity method income of -1,406,651 included in revenues. Prior year restated (redressé). Corrections to prior years of -2,662,252 recorded against accumulated surplus. Total tangible capital assets = 50,473,327 (exploitation) + 9,680,802 (habitation) = 60,154,129. isc_funding is SAC only; total_government_transfers includes SAC 44,881,949 + Santé Canada 0 + SCHL 776,168 + Autres fédéral 5,791,718 + Provincial 9,625,149 = 61,074,984. OSR = 64,635,119 - 61,074,984 = 3,560,135 (includes GBE equity income and band fund revenues). No schedule of remuneration found in extracted text. Retirement expense noted at 1,105,701 for 2020.
